reviews.review_description: The ultimate utility of this experience is not getting realistic answers, don't get me wrong, every simulation effort is well done, in my case it was a lot of fun lying to the machine that it understands 1 out of 2 answers provided (as I am available to work yesterday and hearing the joke about using the time travel machine). I think that the ideal would be to add those data that only HR knows and can be very useful, such as better hiding nervousness, the ideal tone of response, or the type of response that is better "challenged" that would be useful.

developer_response.body: Thanks for trying our app, and thanks for your feedback! We truly appreciate it, and hope to build in some of those features you suggested, like having more challenging responses for instance ::)

reviews.review_title: I went for an interview as homelander xD
reviews.review_description: Cool app! Interviewer sounds a little robotic but the questions where relatable and funny

developer_response.body: Thanks for your support! Love to hear that you found it helpful!

reviews.review_description: I saw this in a facebook post and I got interviewed for the president of the USA. Probably not what I should use it for but it worked fine, a bit of latency lol

Quirky Tool to practice my English!
Am I the only one who feels that the Interviewer it's a bit Mean? 
Feels like I'm unprepared or something haha
